justification: The diff correctly migrates from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 (Jupiter), replacing deprecated annotations (@Before/@After -> @BeforeEach/@AfterEach) and expected exceptions (@Test(expected=...) -> assertThrows(...)). It also adopts Java 21 idioms like pattern matching for instanceof and String.formatted(). The @Serial annotation is correctly added to serialVersionUID fields. The migration is clean and complete, though it doesn't introduce any Java 21-specific features beyond pattern matching (which was introduced in Java 16/17) and String.formatted() (Java 15), so it's not fully leveraging Java 21's unique features like virtual threads or record patterns, but it's a solid migration.
